title: hieracium unctiusculum
intro: Hieracium unctiusculum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to certain regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium unctiusculum include treating wounds, skin conditions, and reducing fever. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve for its medicinal uses.
